name: checkpoint-thread
description: Attribute thread-scoped edits in shared Git workspaces, preserve checkpoints, and ship verified business changes.

interface.shortDescription: Attribute and checkpoint shared Git work.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight skill plus synchronous Hooks that record which thread and goal changed repository content without locking the branch, preserve recoverable checkpoints, and organize verified changes into commits.
defaultPrompt: Use checkpoint-thread to make and ship this repository change safely.
